name: Tom T
bio: Expert at setting complex traps that usually backfire. Surprisingly good at playing the piano.

name: Jerry Jr
bio: Loves high-quality cheddar and outsmarting the house cat. Always finds a way to escape.

name: Oggy Cat
bio: Content with gardening and watching TV, if only the cockroaches would leave him alone.

name: Motu Man
bio: Gains incredible strength after eating samosas. Often gets into trouble with Patlu.

name: Sponge Bob
bio: Professional fry cook at the Krusty Krab. Expert at blowing bubbles and jellyfishing.

name: Doraemon Robo
bio: Robotic cat from the 22nd century. Has a 4D pocket full of gadgets to help Nobita.

name: Master Po
bio: The Dragon Warrior. Master of the Wuxi Finger Hold and a professional noodle enthusiast.

name: Ninja Hattori
bio: A highly skilled Iga Ninja. Extremely disciplined and always wears his blue ninja suit.

name: Shinchan Nohara
bio: A naughty kindergarten kid known for his hilarious antics and love for choco chips.

name: Ben Tennyson
bio: A young hero with the Omnitrix, allowing him to transform into various powerful aliens.
